destinationStep.heading: Where in the Balkans?
destinationStep.description: Pick a country to focus on, or leave it open and we'll draw from the whole region.

discoveryStep.label: Looking for something specific? (optional)
discoveryStep.description: Try "quiet alternatives to Dubrovnik", "best wine villages in Istria", or "road trip from Zagreb to Kotor" — our AI discovery layer will look beyond the curated list for you.

paceHints.relaxed: Fewer stops, more time to linger
paceHints.balanced: A steady mix of moving and staying

interestsStep.label: Interests
interestsStep.description: Pick a few — these shape the hidden gems and day trips we surface.

vibeStep.moodDescription: Sets the tone and emotional register of your itinerary prose.
vibeStep.cuisineDescription: Shapes the food culture highlights and dining suggestions in your itinerary.

reviewStep.heading: Review your trip
reviewStep.variantsNote: We'll generate three route options — Conservative, Balanced, and Explorer — so you can compare a slower pace against a fuller one.

errors.generateFailed: The planner couldn't put this trip together. Please try again.

discovery.curatedBadgeHint: Every stop above comes from our editorially vetted destination database.
discovery.sectionDescription: These places aren't in our curated database yet. Our AI discovery layer proposed them for your request, and each passed a structural plausibility check before being shown here — that's not the same as an editorial fact-check.

verificationStatus.structurally_checked: Structurally checked — not an editorial fact-check
